meta.title: Oviva Care – Women's Hormonal Health Webinar
meta.description: Save your spot at the women's hormonal health webinar. Boost your mood and get back your energy.

hero.question: You feel tired, hungry, foggy, anxious, and you crave for sugar all the time?
hero.headline: Boost Your Mood & Get Back Your Energy

items.text: no matter how much you sleep?

dive.title: What we'll dive into:
dive.item1Desc: Explore the causes of fatigue, brain-fog, anxiety, sleep issues, and sugar cravings.
dive.item2Desc: Gain simple, everyday strategies to combat brain fog, improve focus, and manage symptoms.
dive.item3Desc: Identify what's contributing to your anxiety and sleep problems and get actionable solutions.
dive.item4Desc: Learn how hormonal changes affect these symptoms and what's really going on in your body.
dive.item5Desc: Discover ways to balance your hormones and curb your sugar cravings.
dive.item6Desc: Connect with other women facing similar challenges and share experiences.

speaker.title: Meet our speaker
speaker.name: Agnieszka Fronia
speaker.bio1: Hi, I am Agnieszka and I am certified women's health expert with passion for helping others.
speaker.bio2: For many years, I struggled with hormonal health issues such as acne, hair loss, weight gain, absence of periods, insomnia, and high levels of stress and anxiety. I decided to take control of my health.
speaker.bio3: Since 2015, I've travelled across South America and India, exploring various methods to resolve my symptoms. I became a certified yoga, meditation, and breath-work teacher.
speaker.bio4: I earned an MSc in Psychological Medicine and Mental Health from London Metropolitan University, related to hormones, inflammation and gut health.
speaker.bio5: My goal is to help you navigate your hormonal, physical, psychological, and emotional health with ease.
speaker.bio6: Join my upcoming webinar so we can get to know each other better and gain the knowledge you need to take control of your health.

oviva.title: What is Oviva Care
oviva.mission: Our mission is to create a future where every woman has the Knowledge, Resources and Support.

testimonials.title: What people are saying
testimonials.lauraQuote: Very resonating session with a good balance for theory and practice. Very practical and easy to integrate. I think the hormonal world is a very unknown and influential world, so I believe more webinars like this are needed more often.
testimonials.manuelaQuote: In Agnieszka I found a professional and at the same time human curiosity - devoid of any form of judgment. NO ANY PRE-SET PLAN. Agnieszka supported me through a customized program based on my symptoms. I learnt to take care of my thoughts, my spaces, my daily routine and all of this is having such a profound impact on my whole life!
testimonials.patrycjaQuote: I was diagnosed with PCOS a few years ago. It was Agnieszka who drew my attention to test myself in this direction when I told her how I felt and what my symptoms were. Thanks to her, I am definitely more aware of the direction in which I should be going. I am only at the beginning of this road, because I have recently decided to stop taking birth control. I believe that with her help I will achieve my health goal.

cta.headline: Boost Your Mood & Get Back Your Energy
